name: Payaza
description: Payaza — West Africa payment gateway covering Nigeria and Ghana with cards, bank transfers, and USSD for online businesses.

seo.title: Payaza — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Payaza: Payaza — West Africa payment gateway covering Nigeria and Ghana with cards, bank transfers, and USSD for online businesses.

when_to_use: Accepting cards and bank transfers for Nigerian online businesses
USSD payment integration for unbanked West African users
Merchant checkout integration for Ghana e-commerce platforms

pros: Covers Nigeria and Ghana in one API
Cards plus USSD and bank transfers
cons: Less established than Paystack or Flutterwave
review.verdict: Viable West African gateway, but Paystack and Flutterwave remain the safer default for most teams.
review.best_for: West African SMBs who want a local alternative to Paystack with USSD support
review.not_for: Merchants needing pan-African or global coverage with mature ecosystems

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
